RPC error: [OpenSea Seaport] name failed: ContractFunctionExecutionError: The contract function "name" returned no data ("0x").

This could be due to any of the following:
  - The contract does not have the function "name",
  - The parameters passed to the contract function may be invalid, or
  - The address is not a contract.
 
Contract Call:
  address:   0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
  function:  name()

Docs: https://viem.sh/docs/contract/readContract
Version: viem@2.47.5

lessons.abi_signature: function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) returns (bool)
lessons.detail: Transfer USDC from whale via impersonation
lessons.notes: USDC has 6 decimals. Use anvil_impersonateAccount for whale transfers.

lessons.abi_signature: function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)
lessons.detail: Approve WETH for Uniswap V3 Router
lessons.notes: Max approval (type(uint256).max) common for DEX interactions

lessons.abi_signature: function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)
lessons.detail: Approve USDC for Aave V3 Pool

lessons.abi_signature: function exactInputSingle((address tokenIn, address tokenOut, uint24 fee, address recipient, uint256 deadline, uint256 amountIn, uint256 amountOutMinimum, uint160 sqrtPriceLimitX96)) returns (uint256 amountOut)
lessons.detail: Real swap: 1 WETH → USDC on Uniswap V3
lessons.notes: fee=3000 is 0.3% pool. sqrtPriceLimitX96=0 means no price limit. deadline should be future timestamp.

lessons.abi_signature: function supply(address asset, uint256 amount, address onBehalfOf, uint16 referralCode) external
lessons.notes: referralCode=0 for no referral. Asset must be approved first. onBehalfOf can be different from msg.sender.

lessons.abi_signature: function getReserveData(address asset) returns (uint256 configuration, uint128 liquidityIndex, uint128 currentLiquidityRate, ...)
lessons.notes: Rates are in RAY (1e27). Convert: APY = (rate / 1e27) * 100. liquidityRate=supply, variableBorrowRate=borrow.

lessons.abi_signature: function withdraw(address asset, uint256 amount, address to) returns (uint256)
lessons.notes: Use type(uint256).max to withdraw all. Returns actual amount withdrawn.
